title: GRCH-384 # 3 The story of a beautiful young man whose erection does not stop due to the residual scent of his best friend ♂ 7 men and women apartment story ~ Indecent daily life of residents ~ - You And Ayumi
description: Kaede Uehara, a mob-like existence of humankind. One day, the man who called out was Daiki, his first love. Daiki is the host, and he lives in the same apartment as Kaede with his colleague Shota. Daiki's first love is Kaede, and the joy of seeing Kaede for the first time in a long time cannot be hidden. Contrary to such exciting Daiki, the housemate Shota seems to be frustrated for some reason ...
